nodes.label: AI die werkt en blijft werken
nodes.norm_label: ai die werkt en blijft werken

nodes.label: Shared Dependency-Free Static Architecture
nodes.rationale: Each variant is a standalone static HTML page built without a framework, bundler, or runtime dependencies to support SEO, GEO, and simple maintenance.

nodes.label: Fixed Five-Route Contract
nodes.rationale: All five routes are built and future changes replace only content, never the established paths.

nodes.label: JavaScript CDN and Reduced-Motion Fallback Verification
nodes.norm_label: javascript cdn and reduced-motion fallback verification

nodes.label: Dependency-Free Reproducible QA
nodes.rationale: Browser and validator checks remain locally reproducible, and no new dependencies, credentials, assets, or MCP configuration were introduced.

nodes.label: Brutalistisch B Yellow-Navy Relationship Deck Design
nodes.norm_label: brutalistisch b yellow-navy relationship deck design

nodes.label: Progressive GSAP and WebGL Motion System
nodes.norm_label: progressive gsap and webgl motion system

nodes.label: Accessible Static Fallback
nodes.rationale: All content is server-rendered and remains visible without JavaScript or WebGL; enhancements add controls and motion without becoming prerequisites.

nodes.label: No Runtime Network Dependency for Motion
nodes.rationale: The official GSAP distribution is loaded locally with defer so no CDN or runtime network request is required.
nodes.norm_label: no runtime network dependency for motion

nodes.label: Static Demo CTA Contact-Page Fallback
nodes.rationale: The live form depends on WordPress and Gravity Forms server-side processing, so static variants use the verified official contact page instead of inventing an endpoint.

nodes.label: Optional GSAP Progressive Enhancement
nodes.rationale: CSS exposes the final state by default, while GSAP and ScrollTrigger add motion and navigation status only when available and appropriate.

nodes.label: AI That Works and Keeps Working
nodes.author: Artific B.V.
nodes.norm_label: ai that works and keeps working

nodes.label: Accessible Brand Color Combinations
nodes.author: Artific B.V.
nodes.rationale: Brand colors are constrained by documented WCAG contrast combinations, including navy on light surfaces and large white text only on blue.

nodes.label: Direct Expert and Accessible Tone of Voice
nodes.author: Artific B.V.
nodes.norm_label: direct expert and accessible tone of voice

nodes.label: Authentic Dutch Visual Language
nodes.author: Artific B.V.
nodes.rationale: Imagery should feature authentic people and work settings with whitespace and brand-colored accents, avoiding generic stock, AI robots, and dystopian clichés.

nodes.label: Artific Navy Wordmark with AI Superscript Mark
nodes.norm_label: artific navy wordmark with ai superscript mark

nodes.label: Municipality of The Hague Coat of Arms and Wordmark
nodes.norm_label: municipality of the hague coat of arms and wordmark

nodes.label: Logo Usage Rules
nodes.rationale: Official logo variants are restricted to approved backgrounds, a minimum digital width of 80px, automatic undistorted height, and manually checked clearspace.

nodes.label: Directional Contrast Contract
nodes.rationale: Contrast is recalculated from canonical hex values so printed ratios, DOM placement, overrides, and resolved custom properties cannot silently permit inaccessible combinations.

nodes.label: Build-Time Brand Gate
nodes.rationale: PDF provenance, asset hashes, palette use, logo surfaces, and contrast are validated during the build so visitors never depend on loading the source PDFs.

nodes.label: Progressive Enhancement Deck Contract
nodes.rationale: The customer deck remains native-scrollable, keyboard-operable, and fully populated without JavaScript; motion augments rather than replaces source content.

nodes.label: Accessible Navigation Contract
nodes.rationale: Breakpoint-specific header layouts, scroll offsets, focus order, target outlines, and 44px interaction targets preserve usable navigation at every tested width.

nodes.label: Minimalist Editorial Rhythm
nodes.rationale: Large typography, broad whitespace, alternating light and dark sections, and code-native product visuals keep the page restrained without becoming empty or generic.

nodes.label: Native Motion Standard
nodes.rationale: Transform and opacity motion, offscreen pausing, static reduced-motion frames, and a no-JavaScript fallback provide performance without making animation necessary for comprehension.

nodes.label: Responsive Accessibility Contract
nodes.rationale: Complex layouts linearize at defined breakpoints while essential content, keyboard menu controls, aspect-preserved logos, and reduced-motion behavior remain available.

nodes.label: Verified Palette Contract
nodes.rationale: Only verified brand values are used, without derived tints, transparency, gradients, or blur, to preserve evidence-grade visual consistency and accessible contrast.

nodes.label: Progressive GSAP Motion
nodes.rationale: Short one-time GSAP entrances are guarded for missing libraries and reduced motion; no opacity, scrub, pinning, parallax, automatic scroll, or layout animation is permitted.

nodes.label: Static Header Contract
nodes.rationale: The header remains static at every width so content flow and anchor offsets stay predictable across responsive layouts.

nodes.label: Minimalist Royal De Ree Holland Logo
nodes.norm_label: minimalist royal de ree holland logo
